nodes.name: setup-package-manager.test.js
nodes.summary: Integration test suite for the setup-package-manager script, verifying detection of npm/pnpm/yarn/bun package managers, config file writing, error handling for invalid inputs, and filesystem interaction with temporary directories.

nodes.name: runTests
nodes.summary: Main test orchestration function that runs all package manager detection and configuration scenarios using a custom test harness, covering auto-detection, explicit selection, error cases, and file output.

nodes.name: skill-create-output.test.js
nodes.summary: Comprehensive unit test suite for the skill-create-output module, verifying all output formatter functions (header, footer, analysisResults, patterns, instincts, nextSteps, output, analyzePhase) including ANSI formatting, box-drawing character widths, and edge cases.

nodes.name: runTests
nodes.summary: Exhaustive test runner covering all output formatting functions of the skill-create-output module, including terminal width handling, ANSI stripping, and box-drawing consistency.

nodes.name: captureLog
nodes.summary: Test helper that intercepts console.log calls during a function execution and returns the captured output, used throughout the suite to assert on formatted log output.

nodes.name: sync-ecc-to-codex.test.js
nodes.summary: Unit test file for the sync-ecc-to-codex script, verifying the presence of required synchronization logic patterns in the script source, including runOrEcho usage and expected output behavior.

nodes.name: trae-install.test.js
nodes.summary: Integration test suite for the trae-install/uninstall scripts, validating manifest file updates, file creation, deduplication behavior, symlink handling, and cleanup across multiple temporary directory scenarios.

nodes.name: runTests
nodes.summary: Main integration test runner for trae install/uninstall, covering manifest-entry addition, file creation, idempotency, and symlink-aware uninstall across isolated temp directories.

nodes.name: test_astraflow_provider.py
nodes.summary: Pytest test module for the AstraflowProvider and AstraflowCNProvider LLM providers, covering endpoint selection, OpenAI-compatible payload generation, temperature forwarding, tool call parsing, and malformed argument handling.

nodes.name: test_builder.py
nodes.summary: Pytest test module for the PromptBuilder and adapt_messages_for_provider utilities, verifying message construction with and without system prompts, tool injection, config validation, and provider-specific message adaptation.

nodes.name: TestPromptBuilder
nodes.summary: Test class covering PromptBuilder scenarios: building without/with system messages, adding system from keyword options or PromptConfig, error on conflicting config, and tool injection.

nodes.name: TestAdaptMessagesForProvider
nodes.summary: Test class verifying that adapt_messages_for_provider correctly transforms message lists for Claude, OpenAI, and Ollama backends.

nodes.name: test_claude_provider.py
nodes.summary: Pytest test module for the ClaudeProvider LLM provider, verifying that generate() correctly collects text blocks and one or more tool_use blocks from Anthropic API responses, and copies dict-based tool arguments.

nodes.name: test_executor.py
nodes.summary: Pytest test module for ToolRegistry and ToolExecutor components, verifying tool registration, retrieval, execution of known and unknown tools, and batch execution via execute_all.

nodes.name: TestToolRegistry
nodes.summary: Tests for ToolRegistry covering registration, has/get/get_definition lookups, and list_tools enumeration.

nodes.name: TestToolExecutor
nodes.summary: Tests for ToolExecutor covering successful execution, graceful handling of unknown tools, and batch execution via execute_all.

nodes.name: test_invariant_runner.py
nodes.summary: Parameterized pytest module testing the invariant runner's sandbox setup, verifying that dangerous shell commands are blocked after _setup_sandbox is called.

nodes.name: test_provider_tools.py
nodes.summary: Pytest test module verifying tool serialization for both OpenAI and Claude (Anthropic) providers, including chat completions format, Anthropic messages format, credential-free construction, empty response rejection, and missing-usage tolerance.

nodes.name: test_resolver.py
nodes.summary: Pytest test module for the get_provider resolver function, covering resolution of all supported providers (Claude, OpenAI, Ollama, Astraflow, AstraflowCN) by name, enum, environment variable, and .llm.env file, including normalization and override precedence.

nodes.name: TestGetProvider
nodes.summary: Test class for the get_provider resolver, covering all provider types, enum-based selection, env-var and .llm.env file interaction, normalization, and override precedence.

nodes.name: test_templates.py
nodes.summary: Pytest test module for the template registry (register_template, deregister_template, clear_templates, get_template), verifying registration, mutability, removal, and validation of empty inputs.

nodes.name: test_types.py
nodes.summary: Pytest test module comprehensively verifying all core LLM type dataclasses: Role, ProviderType, Message, ToolDefinition (including OpenAI and Anthropic serialization), ToolCall, ToolResult, LLMInput, LLMOutput, and ModelInfo.

nodes.name: VERSION
nodes.summary: Single-line version file containing the current release version string for the ECC plugin.
